typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	FileName as string (),
	FoundFile as string (),
	sFileDate as string (),
	sNewFileName as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> LastBPAvail
LastBPAvail sink(input(
		Dep_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Buildpack_Name as string,
		Product_Pack as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Dep_Date = {Dep Date},
		Buildpack_Name = {Buildpack Name},
		Product_Pack = {Product Pack})) ~> OLEDBDestination
